item.title: OKI cuts AI server PCB inspection time 80% with AI - International Business Times
item.description: OKI significantly reduces PCB inspection times by 80% through the commercial deployment of new AI-driven optical inspection technology.

item.title: Intrinsic Unveils AI-Powered Modular Manufacturing Vision
item.description: Intrinsic introduces a new AI-powered modular manufacturing vision system to enhance flexible automation solutions for commercial factories.

item.title: Phase3D Secures $2.9 Million To Scale In-Situ Inspection For Metal AM
item.description: Phase3D secured $2.9 million in funding to scale the commercialization of its in-situ inspection technology for metal additive manufacturing.

item.title: Automated Optical Inspection Market Set For Rapid Expansion With 21.3% CAGR Through 2030 - EIN Presswire
item.description: EIN Presswire reports the commercial Automated Optical Inspection market is projected to see rapid growth with a 21.3% CAGR through 2030.

item.title: Robot Solution Targets Zero-Downtime Quality Inspection with High-Speed AI Vision Technology
item.description: New robot solution leverages high-speed AI vision technology to target zero-downtime quality inspection for commercial automated manufacturing systems.

item.title: How Connected Metrology Is Changing Manufacturing
item.description: Discussion on how connected metrology systems are changing modern commercial manufacturing.

item.title: TopMap Sherpa Launch Simplifies Surface Measurement and Analysis
item.description: Polytec introduces a new software platform to simplify commercial surface metrology systems measurement workflows.
